description: Questo sub-concetto cattura la sensazione di opposizione fisica quando si applica una pressione. Si focalizza sulla forza necessaria per deformare o spostare la superficie.
positive: The marble tabletop resisted my fingertip, a firm, unyielding pressure.
My palm pushed against the granite wall; it offered absolute resistance.
The iron bar felt stubbornly fixed, resisting my attempt to bend it.
The bedrock beneath my heel refused to yield, a solid, unmoving force.
Trying to press my hand into the clay, it presented a tenacious resistance.
Das Metall war hart und bot einen starken Widerstand gegen meinen Druck.
La pietra angolare, sotto la mia mano, offriva una resistenza inamovibile.
The oak doorframe stood firm, resisting my push with considerable force.
Je sentais une résistance palpable en essayant de déplacer le bloc de pierre.
The diamond's surface, even under pressure, presented unwavering resistance.
Mi mano incontrò una resistenza solida contro la lastra di acciaio.
El hielo, al intentar presionarlo, mostró una resistencia considerable.
The frozen ground resisted my foot, a rigid and unyielding barrier.
The ceramic tile didn’t budge; it demonstrated a palpable resistance.
Senti una resistenza tangibile nel tentativo di spingere la piastra di titanio.
The titanium felt incredibly resistant, almost unmovable under my hand.
La pioggia, battendo contro il vetro, generava una resistenza sensibile.
The bronze sculpture felt incredibly dense, resisting my touch completely.
Le pierres, assemblées, offraient une résistance collective impressionnante.
The brick wall felt solid, resisting my attempt to shift it slightly.
The cold metal offered a stubborn resistance to my warming fingers.
Il mattone, pressato, si dimostrò resistente a una certa pressione.
The concrete felt implacable, resisting every attempt at displacement.
La terra battuta, compressa, presentava una resistenza notevole.
The glacier ice proved remarkably resistant to my probing touch.
The steel cable resisted my pull with unwavering tenacity.
La superficie della pietra fusa si dimostrava resistente alla deformazione.
The metal plate felt intensely resistant; a challenge to my grip.
The ancient stone felt unshakeable, offering a firm resistance.
The polished granite slab presented a surface of absolute resistance.
The heavy lid resisted my efforts to lift it – a substantial force.
La roccia, compressa, mostrava una resistenza notevole alla pressione.
The compressed earth resisted my digging, a dense, unyielding mass.
The ceramic felt unyielding, resisting my attempt to deform it.
The reinforced concrete offered a formidable resistance to pressure.
Il pavimento piastrellato resisteva al mio peso con fermezza.
La pietra lavorata si dimostrava resistente alla compressione.
The metal rod resisted bending, maintaining its rigid structure.
The frozen ground provided a resistant surface for walking.
La placca di metallo, pressata, offriva una resistenza significativa.
The tightly packed sand presented a resistant surface.
The dense clay felt immovable, resisting my pressure.
The frozen earth resisted my attempts to break through it.
The compacted snow offered a resistant surface beneath my skis.
The heavy stone block presented a substantial resistance.
Il blocco di pietra resisteva al mio tentativo di spostarlo.
The tightly packed soil resisted my attempt to dig.
The iron ore felt incredibly dense, offering strong resistance.
The tightly woven fabric resisted tearing, a testament to its strength.
The packed snow resisted my foot, providing a firm surface.
negative: The foam padding yielded instantly under the slightest pressure.
The gel cushion offered little resistance, collapsing under my weight.
The putty gave way easily, molding to the shape of my finger.
The wet sand flowed freely, offering almost no resistance to my hand.
The sponge compressed readily, a soft and yielding sensation.
Das Kissen gab sofort nach, ein Gefühl von völliger Nachgiebigkeit.
La schiuma, premuta, cedette immediatamente sotto la pressione.
The modeling clay gave easily, a sensation of effortless yielding.
Je sentais que le matériau cédait sous ma pression, sans aucune résistance.
The butter spread smoothly, presenting a completely yielding surface.
La cera si scioglieva sotto la mia pressione, cedendo senza resistenza.
El barro se deformó fácilmente bajo mi tacto, mostrando una cedevolezza.
The freshly tilled soil gave way beneath my feet, soft and yielding.
The pillow compressed easily, offering a yielding and comfortable feel.
Senti la gomma cedere sotto il mio peso, senza alcuna resistenza.
The marshmallow dissolved almost instantly, a completely yielding sensation.
Le sable mou offrait une résistance minimale, cédant facilement.
The whipped cream collapsed immediately under the slightest touch.
La sabbia bagnata si modellava facilmente, cedendo senza resistenza.
The foam rubber yielded immediately, a soft and yielding response.
Il burro si spalmava facilmente, cedendo sotto la pressione.
The playdough gave way effortlessly, a sensation of complete yielding.
La pasta di pane cedeva sotto la pressione delle mie dita.
The soft clay yielded easily, a sensation of effortless compression.
The freshly fallen snow sank under my weight, offering no resistance.
La gelatina tremolava, cedendo a ogni mio movimento.
The down feathers compressed easily, a completely yielding texture.
The wet clay yielded to my touch, a sensation of easy compression.
Le sable mou cédait sous mon pied, sans aucune résistance.
The fluffy cotton felt yielding and soft, collapsing under my touch.
La schiuma di sapone svaniva rapidamente, cedendo senza resistenza.
The soft fabric yielded easily, a sensation of effortless drape.
Il tessuto leggero cedeva sotto la pressione, un'esperienza piacevole.
The moist earth gave way under my feet, a yielding and soft sensation.
La crema al cioccolato si spandeva facilmente, cedendo senza resistenza.
The freshly baked bread yielded easily under my touch.
La sabbia fine cedeva sotto il mio peso, un'esperienza piacevole.
The soft leather yielded readily, a sensation of luxurious give.
The wet clay felt pliable, yielding easily to my touch.
La spugna si comprimeva facilmente, un'esperienza cedevole e piacevole.
The freshly turned soil yielded readily under my shovel.
The pliable plasticine gave way easily, a sensation of complete yielding.
La crema spumosa cedeva sotto il mio peso, un'esperienza piacevole.
The soft wool felt yielding and comfortable against my skin.
Il fango cedeva sotto i miei piedi, una sensazione cedevole.
The freshly fallen snow offered minimal resistance, yielding easily.
La pasta di zucchero si modellava facilmente, cedendo senza resistenza.
The soft rubber gave way under my weight, a sensation of easy compression.
Il gelato si scioglieva rapidamente, cedendo sotto il calore.
The freshly churned butter yielded easily, a soft and giving texture.
